creator: wb@yorikke.arb-phys.uni-dortmund.de
text:
I am trying to install p5-Gateway. This depends
	on perl5.00502. I have perl5.004_04 installed (did not
	want to download just for a minor release).
	p5-Gateway and the p5 packs, which it depends on all say
	p5-PGP-Sign-0.08 depends on executable: perl5.00502 - not found
	and similar.

	I got into a maze of dependencies, which did not resolve
	as expected.

Fix: 

I think, all perl5 modules should only depend on perl5 in any
	released version and on other modules.
